UPDATES PREVIOUS TSTM WND DMG REPORT FROM 3 ESE BELMONT. IN CONJUNCTION WITH AN ASSESSMENT BY THE LAFAYETTE COUNTY EM AND PICTURES FROM THE AREA, IT HAS BEEN CONCLUDED THAT STRAIGHT LINE WIND GUSTS BETWEEN 70 AND 80 MPH RESULTED IN ROOF, SILO ROOF AND TREE DAMAGE FROM THE SOUTH SIDE OF BELMONT INTO THE TRUMAN AREA.

NWS STORM SURVEY CONFIRMS AN EF-0 RATED TORNADO WITH PEAK WINDS OF 80 MPH. STARTING POINT IS JUST WEST OF FORT ATKINSON NEAR HIGHWAY A BETWEEN ADVENT RD. AND KLEMENT RD. THE TRACK WAS TO THE SOUTHEAST, ENDING IN SOUTHEASTERN FORT ATKINSON NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF HACKBARTH RD. AND BRAMBLE BUSH LN.
ROOF DAMAGE, TREES DOWN AND WINDOWS BLOWN OUT ACROSS THE SOUTH END OF TOWN. POSSIBLE TORNADO. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR.
